description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage define a UnitTest job that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs a before_script that adds the Google Chrome repository, installs google-chrome-stable, xvfb, unzip, downloads and unzips chromedriver 2.32, installs Python requirements, runs Django migrations, collects static files, and starts the development server in the background. The UnitTest job then executes "coverage run manage.py test" followed by "coverage report -m" and runs on_success. In the deploy stage define a Deployment job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, runs a before_script installing the dpl gem and the Heroku CLI via the official installer script. The Deployment job runs "dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY", exports HEROKU_API_KEY, and runs "heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate", targeting the production environment with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST.
